title: AI Manager Provider Resolution

standard_provider_resolution: AiManager calls instance($name) → delegates to MultipleInstanceManager
YES → getDefaultInstance(): read config 'ai.default'; if Lab enum → use ->value
getInstanceConfig($name): read config 'ai.providers.{name}'; driver key may be Lab enum → convert to string; set config['name']=$name
MultipleInstanceManager resolves driver key → calls create{Driver}Driver(config)
Factory method instantiates ConcreteProvider with gateway(s) + config + Dispatcher
NO  → throw LogicException('Provider does not support {type} generation.')
fakeable_provider_resolution: Call xxxProvider($name) → standard resolution flow (see above)
END: Caller receives provider backed by FakeXxxGateway
text_provider_for_agent: Call textProvider($name) → standard resolution + instanceof TextProvider check
END: Caller receives TextProvider, optionally with per-agent fake gateway
faking_setup: Test calls AiManager::fakeAudio(responses) → creates FakeAudioGateway, stores in $this->fakeAudioGateway
Same pattern for fakeImages, fakeEmbeddings, fakeReranking, fakeTranscriptions, fakeFiles, fakeStores
For agents: fakeAgent(Agent, responses) → stores per-agent gateway in map (InteractsWithFakeAgents)

config: getDefaultInstance(): string — reads 'ai.default', handles Lab enum
getInstanceConfig(string $name): array — reads 'ai.providers.{name}', normalises Lab enum driver, injects 'name' key

conditions_and_branches: config 'ai.default' is Lab enum → convert to ->value string
config driver is Lab enum → convert to ->value string
instance instanceof XxxProvider → proceed | throw LogicException
xxxIsFaked() (gateway property non-null) → inject fake gateway via clone | return real provider
hasFakeGatewayFor(Agent) → inject per-agent fake gateway via clone | return real provider
important_notes: AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager (Laravel). Provider type-safety is enforced post-instantiation via instanceof checks; unsupported types throw LogicException at runtime. Faking is per-type (gateway substitution via clone+useXxxGateway). Agent-level faking is orthogonal and only applies to TextProvider. Drivers with dedicated gateway objects (Anthropic, Gemini, OpenAI) receive gateway + config + Dispatcher; others receive only config + Dispatcher.
